title: OEBConfig
description: Repo-level asset resolution config (oeb.config.json). asset_root is a directory (repo-relative or absolute); the OEB_ASSET_ROOT environment variable, when set, OVERRIDES asset_root (used when the library lives on an external drive). assets maps logical asset IDs to files (and optionally a node inside the file) relative to the effective root. Resolvers/exporters MUST fail loudly when the effective root or a mapped file is missing — never bake dead absolute paths into scene files.

file.description: Path relative to the effective asset root. Never absolute.

node.description: Object/prim name inside the file, for multi-asset containers.
